hero.title: Driving Global Innovation with Artificial Intelligence
hero.description1: IBEREX is an international technology company combining AI R&D with localized operations across Europe.
hero.description2: With AI as our core engine, we deliver intelligent solutions and digital transformation services to global clients.

items.title: AI Technology Research & Development
items.description: Covers foundational software development, algorithm research, and AI application software.

items.title: Intelligent Applications & System Integration
items.description: Provides industry application systems, intelligent control systems, and end-to-end solutions.

items.title: Technical Services & Innovation Support
items.description: Includes technology development, consulting, transfer, and promotion across the full chain.

items.title: Smart Manufacturing & Equipment
items.description: Involves smart foundational manufacturing equipment and related technical capabilities.

items.title: Information Security & Network Services
items.description: Covers cybersecurity software, security equipment, information security systems, and internet security services.

items.title: Platform & Ecosystem Development
items.description: Includes AI public service platforms and innovation & entrepreneurship platforms.

about.cardDescription: We partner with automation leaders, energy platforms, and enterprise OEMs to deliver dependable technology for long-lifecycle programs.
about.title: Business Scope Overview
about.description1: IBEREX focuses on the R&D and application of AI technologies and intelligent systems. Around software development, system integration, and information security, we provide integrated services from technical research to industry implementation.
about.description2: Through cross-domain collaboration, we provide efficient, secure, and scalable intelligent solutions.

team.title: Core Management & Technical Team
team.description: Our team brings together cross-domain experts in AI R&D, product engineering, global operations, and industry solution delivery.

members.title: Technical Director
members.name: Zhenyu Wang
members.description: Responsible for technical solutions and product delivery.

members.title: CEO
members.name: Cheng Dou
members.description: Responsible for European market strategy, localized operations, and compliance, leading international expansion and execution.

members.title: Marketing Director
members.name: Zijian Ge
members.description: Supports compliance and risk control in cross-border business, driving localized collaboration and resource integration.

contact.title: Let’s Discuss Your Next Program
contact.description: Tell us your product requirements and our engineering team will respond with the right component roadmap.
contact.address: Madrid Innovation Campus, Calle de Tecnología 88, Spain

partners.title: Ecosystem Partners
partners.description: We maintain long-term collaboration with universities, research institutes, industry associations, and enterprise partners to drive AI innovation and industrial implementation.
